headline: MoldySoft Reboots Clumsy the Paperclip as a Crypto Miner
summary: 'You look like you're trying to lose your savings. Need help?'
fullBody: Clumsy 2.0 mines ShibaFlokiCoin in the background. Laptops now smell of burnt circuits and regret. MoldySoft denies responsibility, saying 'we told you to upgrade to Clumsy Pro for $29.99.'
